privileged_info_summary: The Dispatch Officer user account (dispatch@opencad.local, user ID 3) is initially configured with only Communications department (ID 1) access. The task requires granting this user access to two additional departments: Highway (ID 3) and Sheriff (ID 4), while retaining the existing Communications access, resulting in exactly three department assignments. All three departments are standard OpenCAD departments configured in the system.
